summary: Defines proportional representation within electoral systems, describing list PR, seat allocation formulas (d'Hondt, Sainte-Laguë).
key_points: Proportional representation is a core concept in electoral system design.
Key characteristics include: list PR, seat allocation formulas (d'Hondt, Sainte-Laguë).
Scholars measure this concept using standardized indicators.
Variations exist across different democratic systems globally.
The concept is distinct from related electoral phenomena.
